corpus.evidence_note: The corpus is a curated favorite set. It supports composition design decisions, but social performance causality requires future metrics such as saves, shares, completion, and audience size.

canonical_compositions.name: Cinematic Full-Bleed Headline
canonical_compositions.summary: A film still or emotionally loaded photograph fills the canvas while a dominant headline occupies the clearest negative-space band.
canonical_compositions.attention_path: image subject → headline → small kicker

ideogram_4.use_when: custom cinematic scene or difficult subject/text relationship

qwen_image_layered.trigger: only when generated scene must become editable or animated

avoid: more than one dominant focal point

canonical_compositions.name: Dramatic Poster Maximal
canonical_compositions.summary: A high-drama poster composition with oversized stacked typography, a central or lower-third hero, and a constrained cinematic palette.
canonical_compositions.attention_path: oversized title → hero face → secondary atmospheric details

ideogram_4.use_when: poster-like spatial drama, masks, theatrical lighting or visual metaphor

qwen_image_layered.trigger: hero, masks, atmospheric fragments, and background need separate layers

canonical_compositions.name: Editorial Object Split Cover
canonical_compositions.summary: A clean editorial cover: large headline block on one side and a single surprising object or cropped body fragment on the other.
canonical_compositions.attention_path: headline → object → author/meta

ideogram_4.use_when: object needs unusual crop or surreal placement

qwen_image_layered.trigger: object overlaps background or must be repositioned

canonical_compositions.name: Portrait Split Cover
canonical_compositions.summary: A personal-brand cover with a clear text column and a large cutout portrait occupying the opposite half.
canonical_compositions.attention_path: headline → face → action cue

ideogram_4.use_when: portrait gesture must interact with copy

canonical_compositions.name: Minimal Highlighted Type Cover
canonical_compositions.summary: A typography-led cover on paper or neutral texture, using one highlighted phrase and one directional line or rule.
canonical_compositions.attention_path: highlighted phrase → remaining title → continuation line
avoid: decorative photo added without semantic need

canonical_compositions.name: Centered Product or Device Mockup Cover
canonical_compositions.summary: A bold format title sits above a centered phone, poster, screen, or product mockup on a branded field.
canonical_compositions.attention_path: format title → centered mockup → small brand mark

qwen_image_layered.trigger: mockup artwork must be split from device/background

canonical_compositions.name: Portfolio Format Grid Cover
canonical_compositions.summary: A section title introduces two to six output examples arranged as a clean portfolio grid.
canonical_compositions.attention_path: format title → example grid → individual thumbnails

canonical_compositions.name: Moodboard Grid with Central Label
canonical_compositions.summary: A 2×2 image grid creates instant abundance and mood while a short label spans the center seam.
canonical_compositions.attention_path: four-image scan → central label → comparative details

ideogram_4.use_when: individual grid images can be generated separately

avoid: different color temperatures without unifying grade

canonical_compositions.name: Solid Field Micro-Statement
canonical_compositions.summary: One short sentence is centered on a single-color field, producing a pause, conclusion, or emotional reset.
canonical_compositions.attention_path: empty field → sentence

canonical_compositions.name: Manifesto Left Column
canonical_compositions.summary: A vertically paced list or manifesto sits in the upper-left quadrant with abundant negative space.
canonical_compositions.attention_path: top line → downward rhythm → open field

canonical_compositions.name: Minimal Gradient Statement
canonical_compositions.summary: A restrained statement floats on a soft gradient or neutral field; bold weight marks the semantic turn.
canonical_compositions.attention_path: first clause → bold phrase → silence

canonical_compositions.name: Dark Inversion Punchline
canonical_compositions.summary: A dark interstitial interrupts a light sequence, carrying one strong corrective or confrontational line.
canonical_compositions.attention_path: black field → white statement → bold ending
avoid: using more than once per short carousel

canonical_compositions.name: Cinematic Scene with Bottom Caption Shell
canonical_compositions.summary: A coherent cinematic scene occupies the frame while a bottom gradient shell carries a large episodic caption.
canonical_compositions.attention_path: scene action → highlighted character → caption

qwen_image_layered.trigger: scene needs parallax or character/background edits

canonical_compositions.name: Full-Bleed Photo Quote Overlay
canonical_compositions.summary: A contextual photograph or meme image carries a bold quote in the strongest negative-space region.
canonical_compositions.attention_path: context image → quote → kicker

canonical_compositions.name: Meme Label Metaphor
canonical_compositions.summary: An existing or generated scene becomes a compact metaphor by labeling two actors, objects, or forces.
canonical_compositions.attention_path: scene gag → label A → label B

qwen_image_layered.trigger: labels refer to movable objects or character layers

canonical_compositions.name: Conceptual Metaphor in Negative Space
canonical_compositions.summary: A sparse conceptual visual—hands, silhouette, lone object, unusual scale—carries the emotional or intellectual metaphor beside short copy.
canonical_compositions.attention_path: text → metaphor object → implied relationship

ideogram_4.use_when: surreal object relationship or unusual crop is the idea

qwen_image_layered.trigger: separate hands, object, and background for motion/editing

avoid: centered object with no relationship to text

canonical_compositions.name: Social Post or Article Card
canonical_compositions.summary: A screenshot-like editorial card mimics a native social post or short article with avatar, headline, body copy, and action icons.
canonical_compositions.attention_path: identity header → headline → body → social actions
avoid: fake UI controls that dominate content

canonical_compositions.name: Two-Column Explainer with Hero Card
canonical_compositions.summary: The slide divides into a structured text column and a large illustrative card or artifact column.
canonical_compositions.attention_path: lesson title → examples → hero card

qwen_image_layered.trigger: hero card must be edited or animated independently

avoid: copy column wider than hero column without reason

canonical_compositions.name: Definition Spine with Branch List
canonical_compositions.summary: A highlighted term and short definition connect to a vertical spine carrying six to eight branches.
canonical_compositions.attention_path: highlighted term → definition → branch scan

canonical_compositions.name: Radial Framework Hub
canonical_compositions.summary: A central hub or axis radiates to numbered framework components, making the system visible at a glance.
canonical_compositions.attention_path: center hub → numbered spokes → component labels

canonical_compositions.name: Timeline Curve and Opportunity Bracket
canonical_compositions.summary: A horizontal time axis uses a curve, milestone, or event peak plus a bracketed consequence/opportunity period.
canonical_compositions.attention_path: axis → peak/milestone → bracket implication

canonical_compositions.name: Numbered Lesson with Before/After Mini-Panels
canonical_compositions.summary: A consistent lesson shell contains a small sequence number, large title, concise explanation, and two comparison mini-panels.
canonical_compositions.attention_path: number → lesson title → explanation → comparison pair

canonical_compositions.name: Examples and Test Stack with Hero Card
canonical_compositions.summary: A teaching slide organizes colored subheads, examples, tests, and corrections in a narrow column beside a symbolic hero card.
canonical_compositions.attention_path: topic title → subhead labels → examples → hero card

canonical_compositions.name: Data Chart with Companion Card
canonical_compositions.summary: A short formula or step list is paired with a compact chart and a symbolic card, turning evidence into a visual system.
canonical_compositions.attention_path: formula → chart curve → symbolic card

canonical_compositions.name: Action Plan Card Grid
canonical_compositions.summary: A compact grid maps days, stages, or actions to individual visual cards and labels.
canonical_compositions.attention_path: action headline → grid scan → day/action labels

qwen_image_layered.trigger: cards need independent motion or replacement

canonical_compositions.name: Stacked Steps with Numbered Bands
canonical_compositions.summary: A large count or number anchors the slide while horizontal colored bands reveal steps in sequence.
canonical_compositions.attention_path: giant number → band 1 → band 2 → band 3 → guide character
avoid: equal emphasis on count and every band

canonical_compositions.name: Question with Evidence Object Row
canonical_compositions.summary: A provocative question occupies the upper half while a quiet row of repeated objects visualizes accumulation, decay, or evidence.
canonical_compositions.attention_path: question → bold phrase → evidence row

canonical_compositions.name: Bad vs Good Side-by-Side
canonical_compositions.summary: Two equally sized examples are compared beneath a numbered lesson and marked with a red rejection and green approval.
canonical_compositions.attention_path: lesson title → bad panel → good panel → verdict icons

canonical_compositions.name: Say / Don’t Say Split
canonical_compositions.summary: The canvas is divided into opposing tinted halves with mirrored content and explicit verbal alternatives.
canonical_compositions.attention_path: left label → left examples → right label → right alternatives

canonical_compositions.name: Contextual Photo A/B Choice
canonical_compositions.summary: Two photo-driven alternatives share the same message, demonstrating how context, gaze, or whitespace changes meaning.
canonical_compositions.attention_path: instruction → option A → option B → verdict

canonical_compositions.name: Weak / Strong or Old / New Contrast Cards
canonical_compositions.summary: Two cards show the same idea under different contrast, hierarchy, wording, or stylistic treatment.
canonical_compositions.attention_path: contrast label → card A → card B → principle

canonical_compositions.name: Quad Collage Comparison
canonical_compositions.summary: Four equal images provide variations of one category, object, event, or mood for rapid comparative scanning.
canonical_compositions.attention_path: upper-left → upper-right → lower-left → lower-right → label

canonical_compositions.name: Dominant Exception Contrast
canonical_compositions.summary: One subject is visually isolated by color, scale, or uniqueness among repeated or desaturated peers.
canonical_compositions.attention_path: pattern field → exception subject → headline

ideogram_4.use_when: one colored hero among repeated/gray figures

qwen_image_layered.trigger: hero and crowd should be independently editable

source_references: Carousel 11 yellow hero among gray peers

canonical_compositions.name: Social Profile Mockup
canonical_compositions.summary: A branded social profile is displayed inside a device mockup beneath a clear format title.
canonical_compositions.attention_path: title → device → profile details

canonical_compositions.name: Content Portfolio Grid
canonical_compositions.summary: Two to six branded content outputs are shown as a coherent portfolio under a format heading.
canonical_compositions.attention_path: format title → first thumbnail → second thumbnail → system coherence

canonical_compositions.name: Palette Swatches with Avatar
canonical_compositions.summary: Large color swatches communicate the visual system while a character cutout overlaps them for identity and scale.
canonical_compositions.attention_path: title → swatches → avatar → color codes

canonical_compositions.name: Single Asset Mockup Stage
canonical_compositions.summary: One finished content asset is centered and framed as a portfolio artifact against a quiet branded background.
canonical_compositions.attention_path: format title → single asset → fine details

canonical_compositions.name: Character Brand Hero
canonical_compositions.summary: A recognizable character or branded avatar anchors the composition with a bold identity-led title.
canonical_compositions.attention_path: face → title → costume/brand cues

canonical_compositions.name: Portrait and Social Actions CTA
canonical_compositions.summary: A large portrait sits beside a direct question or continuation prompt with social action icons below.
canonical_compositions.attention_path: question → face → action icons

canonical_compositions.name: Keyword Comment CTA with Portrait
canonical_compositions.summary: A highlighted keyword command sits above a portrait framed by a hand-drawn aura or circle.
canonical_compositions.attention_path: setup → highlighted keyword → portrait → offer detail

canonical_compositions.name: Repost / Share Arrow CTA
canonical_compositions.summary: A creator portrait, large directional/repost icon, and supporting cards create an explicit share action.
canonical_compositions.attention_path: share headline → face → arrow/repost symbol → proof card

canonical_compositions.name: Character Pair Share CTA
canonical_compositions.summary: Two recognizable characters or creator/character pairings support a large emotional share request.
canonical_compositions.attention_path: share request → character pair → brand symbol

canonical_compositions.name: Text-Only Final Challenge
canonical_compositions.summary: A minimal final line creates urgency or a behavioral challenge with no visual distraction.
canonical_compositions.attention_path: short statement → emphasized final word

canonical_compositions.name: Scene-Based Brand Promise Close
canonical_compositions.summary: The same cinematic series shell closes on a brand promise, transformation statement, or invitation rather than another list item.
canonical_compositions.attention_path: scene → creator action → brand promise

folder_findings.Carousel 1: Cinematic opener followed by radical typographic restraint: solid fields, manifesto rhythm, and one clean timeline. Its strength is pacing through contrast rather than visual novelty on every slide.
folder_findings.Carousel 2: Three full-bleed quote images use culturally familiar, whimsical scenes. Copy is short and the image supplies most of the emotional argument.
folder_findings.Carousel 3: A relationship/identity quote series combining cosmic scale, animal humor, and a labeled meme. The recurring law is one visual joke or emotional metaphor per slide.
folder_findings.Carousel 4: Four affirmation slides with recognizable characters and animals. Large text is placed where the photograph already has silence; the image is never merely decorative.
folder_findings.Carousel 5: An exception/rarity theme: black sheep, child attitude, cartoon calm, and dog romance. Strongest compositional device is the obvious visual metaphor that can be read before the text.
folder_findings.Carousel 6: Privacy/self-protection series using high-recognition pop-culture imagery and short central statements. Repetition of type treatment creates the carousel identity.
folder_findings.Carousel 7: Hope/confidence sequence using humorous situational photography. Two slides use explicit meme labeling while others rely on scene–copy incongruity.
folder_findings.Carousel 8: The most complete high-density educational sequence: dramatic poster cover, clean white lesson shell, colored sectional hierarchy, symbolic cards, one chart slide, one action-plan grid, and a creator-led CTA.
folder_findings.Carousel 9: A highly coherent editorial framework system. Paper texture, serif typography, orange highlight blocks, and line-based diagrams provide repeatable structure without template fatigue.
folder_findings.Carousel 10: A brand case-study carousel rather than a topic carousel. It proves that profile, palette, formats, mockups, and character identity can be composed as one narrative system.
folder_findings.Carousel 11: A 19-slide episodic narrative with fixed shell and variable scenes. The colored protagonist among gray secondary characters creates instant focus; bottom caption and progress dots establish series continuity.
folder_findings.Carousel Grid Mood Date: Eight 2×2 mood grids. Repetition, simple category labels, and image abundance make this ideal for saveable lists and cultural identification.
folder_findings.Carousel LISTICLE + JUXTAPOSITION: A meta-educational comparison system. The strongest recurring grammar is title above, paired examples below, and binary verdict at the bottom.
folder_findings.Carousel LISTICLE TEMPLATE: A disciplined numbered listicle shell. The cover and CTA differ, while every interior lesson retains number, title, explanation, and mini comparison pair.
folder_findings.Carousel Template 1: Contains two distinct grammars: a repeated 2×2 category collage, a native-post/article card, and a strong vertical “don’t say / say” split.
folder_findings.Minimal Style CAROUSEL: A soft-gradient, text-led sequence using large negative space, occasional surreal body fragments, one dark pattern interrupt, and a restrained action close.
